channel.title: zno nano/microrods; zno grains size; hydrothermal synthesis; orientedattachment on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in zno nano/microrods; zno grains size; hydrothermal synthesis; orientedattachment on LMI

item.title: Effect Of Some Amines, Dodecylamine (Dda) And Hexadecyldimethylamine(Dmha), On The Formation Of Zno Nanorods Synthesized By Hydrothermalroute
